docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $184.02 FILED BY ELLIOTT JUDITH AS TO DEFENDANT OMORI YUKO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLIOTT JUDITH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OMORI YUKO $184.02 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $192.02, DEFT SCOTT VOLUNTARILY APPEARED AS DEFT AND WAIVED DEFECTIVE SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT OMORI YUKO
